title: Arcadia Health
preview: Enterprise healthcare analytics prospect evaluating Redwood Dedicated + VPC/Private. Very strict perf SLAs (p95 + throughput) and wants explicit change-management controls: canary-style alerts, rollback gates, and advance notice on runtime/kernel/fleet changes. Heavy focus on auditability (who changed what / when) a...
text: Enterprise healthcare analytics prospect evaluating Redwood Dedicated + VPC/Private. Very strict perf SLAs (p95 + throughput) and wants explicit change-management controls: canary-style alerts, rollback gates, and advance notice on runtime/kernel/fleet changes. Heavy focus on auditability (who changed what / when) and region/SKU-specific performance guarantees.

title: Contoso Financial
preview: Enterprise financial services account in procurement. Strong interest in Redwood Private (VPC) + Dedicated capacity. Core theme: strict data retention and access controls for metering/billing data; wants minimal data exposure, clear audit trail, and contract-grade usage definitions. Metering constraints will impact ...
text: Enterprise financial services account in procurement. Strong interest in Redwood Private (VPC) + Dedicated capacity. Core theme: strict data retention and access controls for metering/billing data; wants minimal data exposure, clear audit trail, and contract-grade usage definitions. Metering constraints will impact what we can show in Console and what Finance can access for recon.

text:
- Req: US-only processing/storage for regulated financial text.
- Exception agreed in principle: allow EU-based professional services subcontractor (Redwood-approved) to access deployment logs/metadata during initial rollout (time-bounded + audited).
- Need formal exception record + customer confirmation email before SOW signature.

text:
Embeddings-heavy workload (batch + online). Primary requirement is predictable throughput on Dedicated reserved capacity with strict latency targets and safe change management for model/runtime upgrades.

Workload:
- ~85–90% embeddings calls, remainder reranking experiments (possible future).
- Mix of online (user query) and batch backfill (index rebuilds).

Performance targets (customer-provided, subject to validation):
- Throughput: peak 2.5k–3k QPS sustained during business hours; batch jobs can spike to “as much as we can push at night.”
- Latency: p95 < 80ms for online embeddings; p99 < 150ms (region-local).
- Availability: expects Dedicated SLA posture; no scheduled downtime windows acceptable.

Routing / rollout needs:
- Wants staged model upgrades without downtime for: embedding model version changes, quantization profile, runtime build changes, and routing policy changes.
- N...
